name: Get-Variable

options.name: -Exclude
options.description: Specifies an array of items that this cmdlet excludes from the operation. Wildcards are permitted.

options.name: -Include
options.description: Specifies an array of items upon which the cmdlet will act, excluding all others. Wildcards are permitted.

options.name: -Name
options.description: Specifies the name of the variable. Wildcards are permitted. You can also pipe a variable name to `Get-Variable`.

options.name: -Scope
options.description: Specifies the variables in the scope.The acceptable values for this parameter are:

options.name: -ValueOnly
options.description: Indicates that this cmdlet gets only the value of the variable.

description: Gets the variables in the current console.
